10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T

30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 5 @ 50%
01:30 5 @ 60%
03:00 3 @ 70%
HOLD 4 Sets
06:00 3 @ 75%
09:00 3 @ 75%
12:00 3 @ 75%
15:00 3 @ 75%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
BUY IN: 100 Double Unders
3 RFT
15 Cal Assault Bike
12 DB Bench Press
3 Rope Climbs
2 mins rest
Buy out 100 Double Unders
18 min Time Cap

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Negative Pull Ups
AS SLOW AS POSSIBLE
If you can do more than 5, GO SLOWER
Scale to Jumping Pull Up, NO BANDS

hypertrophy.reasoning: Chest, triceps, and shoulders are heavily fatigued; target posterior chain and legs for balanced development.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 15 Cal Assault Bike, 12 DB Bench Press, 3 Rope Climbs. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, legs.
